channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Your cloud keys should not exist
item.description: Most cloud platforms that need access to your infrastructure start with the same onboarding step: paste in a service account key. Or an access key and secret. Or a JSON blob you downloaded from...

item.title: Our favorite Prime Day gadgets under $100 you don’t need but will really want
item.description: Prime Day has a funny way of convincing you to buy things you weren’t shopping for in the first place. You sign on intending to buy something sensible you actually need, like a pack of USB-C...

item.title: I built a compiler for how AI agents should write to you
item.description: I kept correcting AI agents in the same ways: "too long," "answer first," "use a diagram," "assume I know the jargon." Each correction improved the current exchange, but the preference was not...

item.title: Algorithmic Entity Resolution in Music Metadata
item.description: In the global streaming economy, Spotify, Apple Music, and other DSPs process billions of plays daily. Behind this massive transaction layer lies a fragmented, dual-copyright structure: The...

item.title: Day 6: my language now compiles to WebAssembly — and I emit the bytes by hand
item.description: I'm building LOOM — a small open-source language that is a machine-checked trust layer for AI-written code. I don't write it by hand anymore: an organism I built grows it, day and night, on my own...

item.title: Manage Sensitive Data In Application Code | 🏗️ Build A Secure Configuration Service
item.description: Exam Guide: Developer - Associate 🏗️ Domain 2: Security 📘 Task 3: Manage Sensitive Data In Application Code Managing Sensitive Data In Application Code is about keeping secrets out of your code,...

item.title: TMX: The open standard AI agent memory has been waiting for
item.description: TMX: The open standard AI agent memory has been waiting for The problem no one talks about: your agent's memories are prisoners. If you build an AI agent today using Mem0, your memories are locked...

item.title: A C++ implementation of a fast hash map and hash set using hopscotch hashing
item.description: Article URL: https://github.com/Tessil/hopscotch-map Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48692090 Points: 6 # Comments: 0

item.title: Prediction: A Frontier open-source LLM Will Be Released On 3rd December 2026
item.description: Article URL: https://blog.doubleword.ai/frontier-os-llm Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48692058 Points: 5 # Comments: 0

item.title: The MOSFET: The Most Manufactured Device in History
item.description: Ask someone to name the most manufactured object in human history and you will hear guesses like the nail, the brick, or maybe the smartphone. The real answer is something almost nobody can name...

item.title: JavaScript Closures: How They Actually Work
item.description: A quick note before we start: this post is for beginners trying to understand how closures actually work. I have done my best as per my limited knowledge to explain what happens under the hood, so...

item.title: The Chinese Control the Majority of Argentina’s Squid Fleet
item.description: Chinese companies control nearly two-thirds of Argentina’s own squid fleet.

item.title: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
item.description: We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers,...

item.title: These are the best deals you can still get on MacBooks before Apple’s price hike kicks in
item.description: Apple just raised the prices on Macs and iPads in response to the rising costs of memory chips, right in the middle of Amazon Prime Day. That means existing discounts (even small ones) on Apple...

item.title: FBI Warns Russian Intelligence Hackers Target Signal Backup Recovery Keys
item.description: The FBI and CISA have updated their March warning about Russian intelligence phishing Signal accounts, and the operators have added a step: they now coax targets into handing over their Signal...

item.title: Our 36 favorite gaming deals on Prime Day for Switch, PS5, and Xbox
item.description: There are some some sizable discounts on new and recent hits from the last few years for the Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and the Xbox Series X / S for Prime Day. Most Amazon game deals are...

item.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
item.description: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and...

item.title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
item.description: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.

item.title: New SharkLoader Malware Deploys Cobalt Strike in StrikeShark Cyberattacks
item.description: A newly discovered cyber attack campaign has been observed delivering a previously undocumented malware family called SharkLoader that acts as a loader for deploying Cobalt Strike Beacon on...

item.title: The beautiful shame
item.description: While European tourists marvel at ranch dressing, Buc-ee's, and other wonders of Middle America, would-be World Cup attendees from Africa, Asia, and the Middle East have experienced a different...

item.title: This video bird feeder is the surprise hit of Prime Day
item.description: I can understand why The Verge readers are flocking to the BirdBuddy deal we posted at the beginning of Prime Day. The BirdBuddy Pro with Solar Panels is a wholesome upgrade for your yard, but the...

item.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
item.description: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending. OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built...

item.title: OpenAI Has New AI Models. Here’s Why You Can’t Use Them
item.description: The White House asked OpenAI to delay the rollout of its GPT-5.6 AI models, two weeks after Anthropic had to take its most advanced AI models offline.

item.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
item.description: Less than 24 hours after news broke that OpenAI would stagger its next model release at the request of the Trump administration, that model, GPT-5.6, is here. On Friday, the company unveiled the...

item.title: Smart lock maker Level has been gutted and its founders are out
item.description: Assa Abloy has laid off the majority of staff at Level Home, the smart lock company known for building smart tech into traditional-looking deadbolts, and is folding the business into Kwikset,...

item.title: Meta Is Testing Facial Recognition for Police and Military
item.description: We know that ICE wants to deploy eyeglasses with facial recognition that can identify people in real time. Turns out Meta is prototyping the feature with a Pentagon supplier. (Alternate news story.)

item.title: You won’t have long to get these iPad deals before Apple’s price hike
item.description: Apple just raised prices across its iPad and MacBook lineup. The good news is that many retailers are still selling their inventory at the old prices or far less, which means you can still score...

item.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
item.description: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

item.title: Chinese-Speaking APT Deploys New TinyRCT Backdoor in Southeast Asia Campaign
item.description: A Chinese-speaking advanced persistent threat (APT) actor has been linked to a new custom backdoor called TinyRCT as part of cyber attacks aimed at government entities and critical infrastructure...

item.title: The 16 best robot vacuum deals you can still get before Prime Day ends
item.description: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. We’re now on the final day of Prime Day, and...
